_note: verify-portforward is intentionally OMITTED here: it validates the learner's live port-forward tunnel (a persistent terminal pane), which cannot span the smoke runner's separate `oc exec` invocations. verify-greeting/verify-new-greeting fetch from inside the app pod instead, so they are equivalent and smoke-safe. imagePullPolicy=Always forces re-pull of the mutable samples/hello-dcs:1.0 tag.

exclude.reason: Validates the learner's live `oc port-forward` tunnel in a persistent terminal pane; the tunnel cannot span the smoke runner's separate `oc exec` invocations. verify-greeting / verify-new-greeting fetch from inside the app Pod instead and are equivalent + smoke-safe.

steps.run: oc create deployment hello-dcs --image=${DCS_REGISTRY}/samples/hello-dcs:1.0 && oc patch deployment/hello-dcs --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/imagePullPolicy","value":"Always"}]' && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=150s
oc set env deploy/hello-dcs GREETING="Hello from the DCS Academy" && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
oc set env deploy/hello-dcs GREETING="Updated without a rebuild" && oc rollout status deploy/hello-dcs --timeout=120s
oc get deploy hello-dcs -o yaml > deployment.yaml
